name: Lobster Rolls
recipeIngredient: A Few Drops of Hot Pepper Sauce
1 lb Freshly Cooked Lobster Meat, cut into 1/2-inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine mayonnaise, lemon juice, celery, onion, parsley, salt, hot pepper sauce, and pepper to taste.
2. Stir in lobster meat until coated.
3. Brush the insides of the rolls with melted butter.
4. Spoon the lobster salad into each roll, dividing evenly.
5. Serve immediately.
